briefs.title: BC Securities Rules Updated: WKSI Shelf Prospectus Fees Now Have New Filing Deadlines
briefs.summary: BC updated its Securities Regulation to recognize a new type of prospectus (a legal document used to raise money from the public) called a 'WKSI base shelf prospectus' — used by large, well-known companies to sell securities (stocks or bonds) quickly. These companies must now report sales proceeds and pay fees to regulators on a monthly or per-tranche (per-offering-round) schedule, depending on how they sell.
briefs.action_required: If your business files a WKSI base shelf prospectus in BC, track monthly sales and submit fees within 5 business days after each month-end.

key_dates.label: BC WKSI base shelf prospectus fee rules take effect
